reason: Unlocking the Chain-of-Thought skill will improve my reasoning and accuracy for future questions, especially as I encounter higher difficulty levels. I have 1 SP available and this is a foundational skill.
Unlocking pe_plan provides both a planning block and a reflection call, which significantly increases accuracy across all categories and provides a safety net for errors.

I am unlocking the Reflection skill to increase my accuracy. Having a second LLM call to review and correct my answers will be vital for tackling higher-level chambers and ensuring I don't lose HP unnecessarily.

I am unlocking the 'ctx_enough' skill to improve my context retention. Having the last 5 Q&A pairs in the message history will help maintain consistency and allow for better referencing of previous challenges and information as I progress deeper into the dungeon.
